rawFiles.name: wikidata-unlocode-enrichment-candidates-2026-07-08.json
rawFiles.notes: Generated by a Wikidata SPARQL query against existing UN/LOCODE identifiers in the local data-automation output directory.

transforms: Query Wikidata for items whose UN/LOCODE exactly matches an existing transport record externalIds.unLocode value.
Accept only existing locality-style transport and trade records with exact UN/LOCODE matches and compatible public identity.
Add Wikidata IDs and dated source references to accepted records.
Do not replace canonical coordinates, names, location types, or operational status from Wikidata.
reviewNotes: Imported 5 Wikidata identifier enrichments from exact UN/LOCODE matches: Al Ladhiqiyah (Q200030), Arwad (Q377802), Baniyas (Q263922), Homs (Q131301), and Yabrud (Q172251). No new location records were added. Tartus Oil Terminal did not have an exact Wikidata UN/LOCODE match and remains unchanged.
